message:
Make WASI-NN optional via build flag for zero-config default builds

- Add -Denable-wasi-nn=true build option for WASI-NN support
- Default build works without WASI-NN plugin installed
- Add AI bindings (__edgebox_ai_chat, __edgebox_ai_available)
- Remove bundle_compiled.c from git (add to .gitignore)

When WASI-NN is needed, build with: zig build wasm -Denable-wasi-nn=true
Run with: wasmedge --nn-preload default:GGML:AUTO:model.gguf
